top3.sql:
SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) as count
FROM bond
WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY bond_type
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH bond_counts AS (
  SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM bond
  WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
  GROUP BY bond_type
),
major_bond AS (
  SELECT bond_type
  FROM bond_counts
  ORDER BY cnt DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT bond_type FROM major_bond) AS majority_bond_type,
  CASE 
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM molecule WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010' AND label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') 
    THEN 'Yes' 
    ELSE 'No' 
  END AS is_carcinogenic;

SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) as count
FROM bond
WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY bond_type
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH bond_counts AS (
  SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM bond
  WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
  GROUP BY bond_type
),
major_bond AS (
  SELECT bond_type
  FROM bond_counts
  ORDER BY cnt DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT bond_type FROM major_bond) AS majority_bond_type,
  CASE 
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM molecule WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010' AND label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') 
    THEN 'Yes' 
    ELSE 'No' 
  END AS is_carcinogenic;

SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) as count
FROM bond
WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY bond_type
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH bond_frequency AS (
  SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) AS frequency
  FROM bond
  WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
  GROUP BY bond_type
),
top_bond AS (
  SELECT bond_type
  FROM bond_frequency
  ORDER BY frequency DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT bond_type FROM top_bond) AS majority_bond_type,
  CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT label FROM molecule WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010') LIKE '%carcinogenic%' 
    THEN 'Yes' 
    ELSE 'No' 
  END AS is_carcinogenic;

final.sql:
WITH bond_counts AS (
  SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM bond
  WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
  GROUP BY bond_type
),
major_bond AS (
  SELECT bond_type
  FROM bond_counts
  ORDER BY cnt DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT bond_type FROM major_bond) AS majority_bond_type,
  CASE 
    WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM molecule WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010' AND label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') 
    THEN 'Yes' 
    ELSE 'No' 
  END AS is_carcinogenic;
